markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and integrate Relay's new brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The strategy will shift to explore high-performing "outlier" topics (e.g., G-Wagon tax write-off) and the "Profit First" content stream, which drives new customers.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Brand Voice Integration:** New content will adopt the "Pathfinder" voice (unwavering, upstanding, audacious, authentic) to improve consistency and humanize the brand.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [**Performance Baseline:** GrowthX will deliver a January performance report and a full progress report next week to provide a baseline for the strategic review.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Headline Style:** Blog headlines will remain in title case for now, deferring a switch to sentence case to avoid a large, retroactive project.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance Review

  - **Performance:** Competitive presence in Scrunch increased from 39 to 45, securing the \#1 spot for tracked prompts.
  - [**Strategic Opportunities:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**"Profit First" Content:** This stream drives new customers and will be explored for expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**"Outlier" Topics:** High-performing posts (e.g., "G-Wagon tax write-off") will be analyzed for conversion quality to determine if they represent a viable new content avenue.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**Topic Pipeline Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Problem:** Topic clusters are imbalanced (e.g., "AI for small business" is robust, "home services" is light), hindering content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Solution:** Bailey will create an Airtable interface showing all content statuses (in review, in production, published) to provide a complete view for topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Brand Voice & Tone Integration

  - [London introduced Relay's new brand guidelines to align content with the "Pathfinder" persona.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [**Core Voice Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [**Unwavering:** Confident, optimistic.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [**Upstanding:** Honest, expert, clear.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [**Audacious:** Bold, gritty, confronts business realities.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [**Authentic:** Human, conversational, not stiff.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [**Tone for Educational Content:** Steady, approachable, and confident, using simple language to avoid jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Implementation Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Goal:** Incrementally improve voice consistency without sacrificing SEO/AEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [**Method:** GrowthX will update its internal guide using the provided document and "gold standard" examples.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
      - [**Headline Style:** Blog headlines will remain in title case for now to avoid a large, retroactive project.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Create Airtable interface showing all content statuses.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Deliver January performance report and full progress report next week.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [Update GrowthX's internal voice guide and share with London for review.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**London:**](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [Analyze conversion quality for "outlier" topics.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Share brand guide (excluding visuals) and "gold standard" content examples with Dave and Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/AtWMLgPzbsBEQZ9VD7YWzxVpZ3zghzzB?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
